productDisplayName: Puma Men Drift Cat III SF NM Black Sports Shoes
description: These stylish Drift cat III Scudera ferrari shoes from puma that have a motorsport friendly design are great for urban wear. These shoes infused with the Ferrari edge are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Assymetric lacing system for a snig Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name embroidered on the tongue, cat logo embossed on the side and cat logo on the heel counter Formstripe on the lateral side with Scudera Ferrari badge below it Metal mesh inserts on the sides of the heel for greater stability Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Phylon midsole for greater lightweight comfort Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater traction Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Sole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heel
